TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kukung, title = Kukung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kukung} }

S.FORM: alang Kukung ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 25 buwan, 67 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 63 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 4 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kukung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kukung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kukung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kukung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kukung hya' ga Skaru. tay mkyahu' na Kukung hya' ga Ruba'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kukung ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 25 buwan, 67 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 63 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 4 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kukung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kukung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kukung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kukung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kukung hya' ga Skaru. tay mkyahu' na Kukung hya' ga Ruba'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kukuŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kukuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na kukuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kukuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kukuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kukuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕkaru. taj mkjaħuʔ na kukuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ruβaʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
